## Logical ID 別設定

### Api Prefix Rewrite Function

Logical ID: `ApiPrefixRewriteFunction62A7D75E`

用途推定: Api Prefix Rewrite Function (AWS::CloudFront::Function)

| 設定項目 | 値 |
| --- | --- |
| `AutoPublish` | true |
| `FunctionCode` | <br>function handler(event) {<br>  var request = event.request;<br><br>  if (request.uri === "/api") {<br>    request.uri = "/";<br>  } else if (request.uri.indexOf("/api/") === 0) {<br>    request.uri = request.uri.substring(4);<br>  }<br><br>  return request;<br>}<br> |
| `FunctionConfig` | {"Comment":"Strip the CloudFront /api prefix before forwarding to REST API Gateway","Runtime":"cloudfront-js-1.0"} |
| `Name` | ap-northeast-1MemoRagMvpStackTxRewriteFunction029A6A1F |
| `Tags` | [{"Key":"Application","Value":"MemoRAG"},{"Key":"CostCenter","Value":"memorag-mvp"},{"Key":"Environment","Value":"dev"},{"Key":"ManagedBy","Value":"aws-cdk"},{"Key":"Project","Value":"memorag-bedrock-mvp"},{"Key":"Repository","Value":"tsuji-tomonori/rag-assist"}] |

### Spa Route Rewrite Function

Logical ID: `SpaRouteRewriteFunction2441F411`

用途推定: Spa Route Rewrite Function (AWS::CloudFront::Function)

| 設定項目 | 値 |
| --- | --- |
| `AutoPublish` | true |
| `FunctionCode` | <br>function handler(event) {<br>  var request = event.request;<br>  var uri = request.uri;<br>  var lastPathSegment = uri.substring(uri.lastIndexOf("/") + 1);<br><br>  if (lastPathSegment.indexOf(".") === -1) {<br>    request.uri = "/index.html";<br>  }<br><br>  return request;<br>}<br> |
| `FunctionConfig` | {"Comment":"Rewrite only SPA client routes to index.html; preserve static asset errors","Runtime":"cloudfront-js-1.0"} |
| `Name` | ap-northeast-1MemoRagMvpStackTeRewriteFunction9EBBE6F6 |
| `Tags` | [{"Key":"Application","Value":"MemoRAG"},{"Key":"CostCenter","Value":"memorag-mvp"},{"Key":"Environment","Value":"dev"},{"Key":"ManagedBy","Value":"aws-cdk"},{"Key":"Project","Value":"memorag-bedrock-mvp"},{"Key":"Repository","Value":"tsuji-tomonori/rag-assist"}] |
